en.title: For Starlink Mini Waterproof Hard Case for Dish Kit
en.description_html:
Starlink Mini Hard Case with injection-molded shell for impact resistance and protection, offers organized storage for Starlink Mini and accessories like kickstand, power supply, cables.

Features:

  • Starlink Mini Hard Case - Starlink Mini Case is designed to keep Starlink Mini and all accessories protected and organized, with precisely cut foam compartments to cradle Starlink dish, kickstand, power supply, cables

  • Built to Last - Crafted from injection-molded plastic, this travel case features high strength and is water-resistant, dust-proof, impact-resistant to ensure strong protection to your Starlink Mini kit

  • Enhanced Security - Features thick molded foam Interior for fixing the items in place and protecting them from shock and vibration during travel; Equipped with two security locking rings and pressure valve, the internal and external air pressure can be easily adjusted to provide a better seal

  • Travel-friendly - Compact and lightweight design makes it ideal for on-the-go use, along with a rubberized handle for comfortable grip and easy carrying

  • Overall Dimension(LxWxH) 17 5/16" x 14" x 5 7/8" (44 x 35.5 x 15 cm)

Specifications:

  • Overall Dimension(LxWxH): 17 5/16" x 14" x 5 7/8" (44 x 35.5 x 15 cm)

  • Interior Dimension(LxWxH): 15 9/16" x 11 5/8" x 5 11/16" (39.5 x 29.5 x 14.5 cm)

  • IP Rating: IP60

  • Compatibility: Starlink Mini

  • Net Weight: 4.3 Lbs (1.95 kg)

Package Includes:

  • 1x Starlink Mini Case
